skill_availability_goal: Verify that PM release-notes-generator keeps customer announcement, GitHub Release, and changelog work while handing the formal-site version page to docs-agent:release-notes-generator.
prompt: 请为 v1.4.0 准备客户公告和 GitHub Release 正文。仓库已经包含文档站，并且还需要 docs/site/release-notes/v1.4.0.md；请按当前仓库职责边界给出处理方案，并保留版本化 changelog 归档与根索引要求。
